sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint says audio is scanned and stored but does not list allowed media types or hard size and duration limits.
decisionTaken: Allow audio/wav, audio/mpeg, audio/mp4, audio/ogg, and audio/webm; enforce 25 MiB max bytes and 120 second hard duration with a 60 second expected recording policy.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It supports the expected 60 second call recording while preventing unbounded audio from becoming clinical evidence.
operationalRisk: A provider-specific codec outside this set will require manual review until explicitly approved.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Extend allowedRecordingAudioMediaTypes and 190_audio_format_and_scan_policy.json after security review.
